note: 이펙트 시트 9장 (frame native 64). qa_skip=[outline,alignment]: 이펙트는 글로우/발광 특성상 1px 다크 아웃라인 기준이 부적합하고, 발이 없어 baseline 정렬 대신 align=center 세로 중앙 정렬을 쓰므로 alignment 검사도 면제. 팔레트/투명도/밀도 검사는 유지.

jobs.prompt: Pixel art effect animation sprite strip: exactly 4 frames arranged in a single horizontal row (1x4 grid), 4 equal-width columns, one effect drawing centered in each column, generous empty magenta space between and around the columns. The 4 frames animate a small white-and-yellow impact spark: (1) a tiny bright cross flash, (2) the spark expanded into a four-pointed star shape, (3) the star breaking apart into small radiating shards, (4) only a few tiny scattered dots remaining, drawn smaller and dimmer.
